info.name: API Testing Playground — 138 Scenarios
info.description:
Import with docs/postman/playground-environment.json.

Run Scenario 008 first (customer login) to set jwt_token, then 009 or 010 for admin_jwt.

Generated from docs/generate-api-test-scenarios.py — keep in sync with API-TEST-SCENARIOS.md.

request.description:
**Scenario 001** — Platform — Get health

**Authentication:** None
**Expected status:** `200 OK`

**Expected response:**
```json
{
  "status": "UP",
  "service": "platform-api",
  "components": { "database": "UP" }
}
```

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON when body expected', function () {

request.description:
**Scenario 002** — Platform — Get version

**Authentication:** None
**Expected status:** `200 OK`

**Expected response:**
```json
{
  "name": "platform-api",
  "version": "0.1.0-SNAPSHOT"
}
```

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON when body expected', function () {

request.description:
**Scenario 003** — Platform — Demo bad request error

**Authentication:** Basic (learner/learner)
**Expected status:** `400 Bad Request`

**Expected response:**
```json
{
  "type": "https://playground.example/problems/bad-request",
  "title": "Bad Request",
  "status": 400,
  "detail": "Demonstration bad request",
  "correlationId": "c1d2e3f4-a5b6-7890-cdef-123456789abc"
}
```

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON when body expected', function () {

request.description:
**Scenario 004** — Platform — Demo not found error

**Expected response:**

```json
}
```

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON when body expected', function () {

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON when body expected', function () {

request.description:
**Scenario 006** — Platform — Validate body (valid)

**Authentication:** Basic (learner/learner)
**Expected status:** `200 OK`

**Expected response:**
```json
{
  "message": "Validation passed",
  "name": "Jane"
}
```

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON when body expected', function () {

request.description:
**Scenario 007** — Platform — Validate body (invalid)

**Authentication:** Basic (learner/learner)
**Expected status:** `422 Unprocessable Entity`

**Expected response:**
```json
{
  "title": "Validation Failed",
  "status": 422,
  "errors": [{ "field": "name", "message": "name must not be blank" }],
  "correlationId": "c1d2e3f4-a5b6-7890-cdef-123456789abc"
}
```

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON when body expected', function () {

request.description:
**Scenario 008** — Banking — Login as customer

**Authentication:** None
**Expected status:** `200 OK`

**Notes:** Save accessToken as jwt_token in Postman.

**Expected response:**
```json
{
  "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJ1c2VyLWN1c3RvbWVyIiwidGVuYW50SWQiOiJ0ZW5hbnQtZGVtbyJ9.SIGNATURE",
  "tokenType": "Bearer",
  "expiresIn": 3600
}
```

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON when body expected', function () {

request.description:
**Scenario 032** — Banking — Delete beneficiary

**Authentication:** Bearer JWT
**Expected status:** `204 No Content`

**Scenario 033** — Banking — Create payment

**Expected status:** `201 Created`

**Expected response:**
```json
{
  "id": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890",
  "transactionId": "b2c3d4e5-f6a7-8901-bcde-f12345678901",
  "partyId": "party-customer-1",
  "accountId": "acct-customer-1",
  "beneficiaryId": "ben-1",
  "amount": 25.50,
  "currency": "GBP",
  "reference": "rent",
  "status": "COMPLETED",
  "createdAt": "2026-07-08T12:00:00Z"
}
```
